name: jtop 监控
desc: jetson-stats 系统监控工具，实时查看 GPU / CPU / 内存使用率

name: Jupyter Lab
desc: 交互式 Python 开发环境，支持 GPU 监控插件

name: Node-RED
desc: 可视化流程编排工具，IoT 与边缘计算场景适用

name: YOLOv26 Dual GMSL
desc: 基于双路 GMSL 相机的 YOLOv26 TensorRT 视觉系统，运行检测、姿态和分割三路推理。
check_cmd: bash -c 'export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH && test -x /home/seeed/yolov26_jetson/run_dual_gmsl_local.sh && test -f /home/seeed/yolov26_jetson/ultralytics_data/yolo26n.engine && python3 -c "import ultralytics, torch, torchvision, onnxruntime" 2>/dev/null'
install_cmds: bash -c 'dpkg -s v4l-utils libcusparselt0 >/dev/null 2>&1 || (sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y git python3-pip v4l-utils libcusparselt0)'

bash -c 'cd /home/seeed && [ -d yolov26_jetson ] || git clone https://gh-proxy.org/https://github.com/bleaaach/yolov26_jetson.git || git clone https://edgeone.gh-proxy.org/https://github.com/bleaaach/yolov26_jetson.git'
bash -c 'export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH && python3 -c "import ultralytics" 2>/dev/null || python3 -m pip install --user "ultralytics[export]"'

bash -c 'export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH && python3 -c "import torch; assert torch.__version__.startswith(\"2.5.0\")" 2>/dev/null || (python3 -m pip uninstall -y torch torchvision 2>/dev/null; F=torch-2.5.0a0+872d972e41.nv24.08-cp310-cp310-linux_aarch64.whl && U=https://github.com/ultralytics/assets/releases/download/v0.0.0/$F && [ -f /tmp/$F ] || wget -O /tmp/$F https://gh-proxy.org/$U || wget -O /tmp/$F https://edgeone.gh-proxy.org/$U && python3 -m pip install --user /tmp/$F)'

bash -c 'export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH && python3 -c "import torchvision" 2>/dev/null || (F=torchvision-0.20.0a0+afc54f7-cp310-cp310-linux_aarch64.whl && U=https://github.com/ultralytics/assets/releases/download/v0.0.0/$F && [ -f /tmp/$F ] || wget -O /tmp/$F https://gh-proxy.org/$U || wget -O /tmp/$F https://edgeone.gh-proxy.org/$U && python3 -m pip install --user /tmp/$F)'

bash -c 'export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH && python3 -c "import onnxruntime" 2>/dev/null || (F=onnxruntime_gpu-1.23.0-cp310-cp310-linux_aarch64.whl && U=https://github.com/ultralytics/assets/releases/download/v0.0.0/$F && [ -f /tmp/$F ] || wget -O /tmp/$F https://gh-proxy.org/$U || wget -O /tmp/$F https://edgeone.gh-proxy.org/$U && python3 -m pip install --user /tmp/$F)'

bash -c 'export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH && python3 -c "import ultralytics, torch, torchvision, onnxruntime; print(ultralytics.__version__); print(torch.__version__); print(torchvision.__version__); print(onnxruntime.__version__)"'
bash -c 'export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH && D=/home/seeed/yolov26_jetson/ultralytics_data && cd $D && [ -f yolo26n.engine ] || yolo export model=$D/yolo26n.pt format=engine device=0 half=True'

bash -c 'export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH && D=/home/seeed/yolov26_jetson/ultralytics_data && cd $D && [ -f yolo26n-pose.engine ] || yolo export model=$D/yolo26n-pose.pt format=engine device=0 half=True'

bash -c 'export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH && D=/home/seeed/yolov26_jetson/ultralytics_data && cd $D && [ -f yolo26n-seg.engine ] || yolo export model=$D/yolo26n-seg.pt format=engine device=0 half=True'
run_cmds: bash -lc 'set -e; DISP="${DISPLAY:-}"; if [ -z "$DISP" ]; then for d in :0 :1 :2; do if xdpyinfo -display "$d" >/dev/null 2>&1; then DISP="$d"; break; fi; done; fi; if [ -z "$DISP" ]; then echo "[ERROR] No active X11 display found. Please log into the Jetson desktop or VNC session first."; exit 1; fi; XAUTH="${XAUTHORITY:-}"; if [ -z "$XAUTH" ]; then for f in "$HOME/.Xauthority" "/run/user/$(id -u)/gdm/Xauthority" /run/user/$(id -u)/.mutter-Xwaylandauth.*; do [ -e "$f" ] && XAUTH="$f" && break; done; fi; export DISPLAY="$DISP"; if [ -n "$XAUTH" ]; then export XAUTHORITY="$XAUTH"; fi; xhost +SI:localuser:$(id -un) >/dev/null 2>&1 || xhost +local: >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; echo "[INFO] Using DISPLAY=$DISPLAY"; if [ -n "${XAUTHORITY:-}" ]; then echo "[INFO] Using XAUTHORITY=$XAUTHORITY"; else echo "[WARN] XAUTHORITY not found, relying on existing session auth"; fi; cd /home/seeed/yolov26_jetson; sed -i "s/\r$//" run_dual_gmsl_local.sh; chmod +x run_dual_gmsl_local.sh; ./run_dual_gmsl_local.sh'
